title: Verify View-Only UI Mode
objective: Tests that non-owners cannot see edit controls.

steps.step: A user is viewing a campaign they do not own (or is not logged in)
steps.expected_result: Campaign dashboard and timeline are rendered

steps.step: Check the UI for edit controls
steps.expected_result: The 'New Tick', 'Edit', and 'Delete' buttons should not be present in the DOM
